offer.headline: Vegetarian Quick Lunch – 15% Off
offer.body_line: Enjoy a fresh veggie sandwich or salad, ready in under 20 minutes. Valid for 10 minutes.
offer.image_prompt: A colorful vegetarian sandwich and side salad on a rustic wooden table, soft natural light, cafe ambiance

why_now_factors: Matches vegetarian_only intent, fills quiet lunch hours with a timely discount under max limits.
